description: The same ascending thruster-and-chest-to-bar-pull-up couplet as 11.6, repeated as its own Open workout the following year.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/open/2012/5 (official CrossFit Games Open workout), retrieved 2026-07-09; ascending ladder (+3 reps each round); pattern continues indefinitely until the 7-minute cap
